name: Dominion Valley Country Club
about: Dominion Valley Country Club is a private country club in Haymarket, Virginia, featuring two Arnold Palmer Signature golf courses and a variety of resort-style amenities. The club offers an elegant lifestyle experience with a newly renovated clubhouse, a fitness center, pools, tennis courts, and a full calendar of social events. Membership options are tailored to different lifestyles, providing access to golf instruction, special interest clubs, and private event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Two 18-hole Arnold Palmer Signature golf courses for championship-level play
Comprehensive instructional programs including Game On golf lessons and youth programs
Exclusive membership benefits and access to a full suite of country club amenities

food_and_drink.notes: Innovative dining options available at the clubhouse
Full bar service and dining options available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club-owned clubs are likely available for use, though personal equipment is recommended for optimal fit and performance.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club offers on-site dining options with innovative menus, though outside food and drink policies may vary by membership type.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On-course play time varies, but the club's two full 18-hole courses typically take 4-5 hours to complete depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers youth golf programs including 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons' and various family-oriented amenities and social events.
